title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Piramal Finance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Piramal Finance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!
